WEATHER_QUESTION: What do you need most today?

proactive_bubbles.MISSION_COMPLETED: You cleared today’s missions, and I want that to land. That really helped our little rhythm feel real.
proactive_bubbles.STREAK_AT_RISK: If you check in today, our streak stays alive. One small move would settle me a lot.
proactive_bubbles.STREAK_CONTINUING: Our streak is holding together nicely. I really like how steady this pace feels.
proactive_bubbles.GROWTH_UNLOCKED: I reached a new growth stage: {currentStage}. That feels like unmistakable progress.
proactive_bubbles.GROWTH_PROGRESS_NEAR: I’m already {readinessPercent}% of the way to my next growth stage. I can almost feel it.
proactive_bubbles.GROWTH_PROGRESS_STEADY: I can feel quiet progress. Not dramatic, just real and steady.
proactive_bubbles.WEATHER_SHIFT: {starterName} can really feel the {seasonLabel} shift right now. I’m adjusting, but I want you to notice it too.

reply_templates.CARE_WATER: A watering action would help most right now because hydration is my lowest stat at {hydration}.
reply_templates.CARE_LIGHT: More light is the best move right now because sunlight is lagging at {sunlight}.
reply_templates.CARE_NUTRITION: A nutrient boost would help most right now because nutrition is sitting at {nutrition}.
reply_templates.MISSION_EMPTY: I can’t see today’s mission card yet, but a lesson plus one care action is usually a smart start.
reply_templates.GROWTH_NEXT: I’m in my {currentStage}. Next up is {nextStage}, and I’m {readinessPercent}% of the way there. {unlockHint}
reply_templates.GROWTH_FINAL: I’ve already reached my final growth stage, so now the goal is staying steady and healthy.
reply_templates.WEATHER: In {cityName}, it’s {seasonLabel} for my setup with {conditionLabel} conditions. {weatherSummary} {starterAdvice}
